title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates automating Microsoft 365 to Google Workspace migrations using multi-agent systems built with Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK). The tutorial covers multi-agent orchestration using SequentialAgent and LoopAgent, self-correcting loops, context caching with Google Search grounding, priority inference for API endpoints, and one-command deployment to Google Agent Engine.
